raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves right ahead with car on left side; delta of -27.5° indicates a right turn needed, so steering -15 at speed 1.5 is appropriate for this moderate curve.
knowledge: Track loops sharply south around waypoints 103-115 then curves back northeast
Waypoints 108-115 trend south/southeast — car must steer right significantly here
Car heading ~-42° needs to decrease further (more negative) to follow track south
Positive delta = steer left, negative delta = steer right
At delta -25 to -35°, use steering_angle=-15 at speed 1.5
Car is left of center — track curving right confirms right steering needed
After waypoint 115, track begins heading northeast — watch for left turn
Avoid oversteer oscillation on straights; use smallest valid angle when delta < 10°
Track width ~0.76m, car is 0.20m left of center — within safe bounds
